Why Kairox

The Difference is in
the Details

01
🛡️

OEM Authorized Supply

Direct manufacturer partnerships ensuring genuine, certified equipment with factory test certificates, compliance documentation, and full warranty support.

02
⚡

Technical Expertise

7+ years of deep domain knowledge across every product category. We provide technical specifications, comparative analysis, and application guidance — not just sales.

03
📋

Complete Documentation

Full documentation support — OEM authorization letters, test certificates, EN/BIS/NFPA compliance documents, and after-sales AMC service.

04
🔥

Full Product Spectrum

From personal escape breathing apparatus to 250L watermist systems and ARAI-approved fire vehicles — every fire safety need covered under one supplier.

05
⏱️

24-Hour Quote Response

Rapid commercial proposals for any requirement. Single point of contact — direct access to the founder for fast decisions and no bureaucratic delays.

06
🔧

Lifecycle Support

Beyond supply — AMC contracts, cylinder hydro-testing, equipment re-certification, spares supply, and technical training support for the full equipment lifecycle.

Product Portfolio

18 Products.
6 Categories.

Professional fire safety and rescue equipment — OEM authorized, fully certified, with complete technical documentation for every application.

Watermist CAFS Systems 7 Products
Watermist CAFS

Watermist CAFS Backpack — Low Pressure

Compact backpack unit ideal for industrial, hospitality and commercial premises. 90% less water than conventional. Safe on live electrical equipment.

9 L Vessel8.5 BarJet 13m55B:233B Rated
Watermist CAFS

Watermist CAFS Trolley — Low Pressure

Larger-capacity trolley for sustained firefighting at warehouses, factories, airports and campuses. Dual firefighter operation capable.

50 L Vessel15 BarJet 13m20s Sustained
Watermist CAFS

Watermist CAFS Backpack — High Pressure

High-pressure backpack for defence, petrochemical, aircraft and naval applications. Penetrates deep-seated fires with rapid 22-second discharge.

10 L Al Alloy34 BarJet 13m22s Rapid
Watermist CAFS

Watermist CAFS Trolley — High Pressure

Large-area coverage for airports, refineries, power plants and tunnels. 120-second sustained discharge. Zero toxic foam residue — eco-safe system.

50 L Al Alloy34 BarJet 13m120s Sustained
Watermist CAFS

Watermist CAFS + Respiratory — Backpack

Integrated firefighting and air supply in one system. Firefighter simultaneously suppresses fire and breathes safely. Faster emergency response vs separate systems.

9L + SCBA Cylinder15 Min AirSpray 6mJet 13m
Watermist CAFS

Watermist CAFS + Respiratory — Trolley

Trolley-mounted combined firefighting and breathing system for plants, tunnels, marine and mining applications requiring extended duration.

50 L SS/Al Alloy30 Min Air15 BarJet 13m
Watermist CAFS · Large Capacity

PowerQuad Watermist 250 L — Stored Pressure

Four-vessel 250L stored pressure system. No pump priming — always ready. Canon spray and CAFS gun discharge. For refineries, airports and petrochemical plants.

4 × 62.5 LSS 316 VesselCanon/CAFS GunAlways Ready
Firefighting Vehicles 3 Products
Fire Vehicle · ARAI Approved

Two-Wheeler Fire Fighter — Air Propellent

ARAI approved motorcycle-mounted firefighting unit on Royal Enfield Classic. Reaches narrow lanes and dense locations inaccessible to conventional fire trucks. Single-rider operation.

Royal Enfield ClassicAir PropellentARAI ApprovedSingle Rider
Fire Vehicle · ARAI Approved

Two-Wheeler Fire Fighter — Engine Powered

ARAI approved engine-powered motorcycle firefighting unit. Higher sustained pressure output vs air-propellent variant. Continuous operation for industries, campuses and airports.

Engine PoweredARAI ApprovedContinuous OperationHigh Pressure
Fire Vehicle · Quick Response

Four-Wheeler Quick Response Vehicle (QRV)

All-terrain Quick Response Vehicle for rapid fire response at airports, refineries, defence establishments and disaster sites. Low operating cost vs full-size fire tender.

400–1000 L Tank38 LPM PumpAll-Terrain 4WDOff-road Capable
Breathing Apparatus 3 Products
Breathing Apparatus

SCBA — Self-Contained Breathing Apparatus

Open-circuit positive-pressure SCBA for firefighters and hazmat teams. First-breath activated lung demand valve. Safe in zero-oxygen atmosphere. CBRN rated options.

EN 137:2006 Type 2Class 3CBRN RatedEN/PESO Cylinders
Breathing Apparatus · Emergency Escape

EEBA — Emergency Escape Breathing Apparatus

Compact personal escape device for offshore, refinery, aircraft and chemical plant personnel. Strap-up-and-escape design — no heavy back-mount required. EN 1146 / MED approved.

2 L Steel/CompositeEN 1146MED ApprovedCompact Design
Breathing Apparatus · Long Duration

Trolley Breathing Apparatus — Long Duration

Multi-cylinder trolley BA for confined space rescue, ship holds, sewer and long-duration industrial operations. Multiple users per set — lower cost per hour.

SS Frame1000+ LPMAS/NZS 1716EN 139
Fire Suppression Systems 2 Products
Fire Suppression · Automatic

Electrical Panel Suppression — Clean Agent

Automatic FK-5-1-12 clean agent total flooding system for server rooms, switchgear and data centres. Zero residue, zero human response needed. 24/7 unattended protection.

FK-5-1-12DLP / ILPFully AutomaticZero Residue
Fire Suppression · Kitchen

Kitchen Fire Suppression — Wet Chemical

Wet chemical Class K suppression for commercial kitchen hoods. Automatic gas shutoff on activation. Cools cooking surface and prevents reignition. NFPA 17A / UL 300 compliant.

Class K AgentNFPA 17AUL 300Auto Gas Shutoff
Gas Detection 1 Product
Gas Detection · Multi-Gas

Gas Detectors — Multi-Gas Monitoring

Portable and fixed multi-gas detection systems for refineries, chemical plants, sewers and mining. Detects LEL, O₂, CO, H₂S. Audio, visual and vibration alarms with data logging and bump test capability.

LEL / O₂ / CO / H₂SAudio/Visual/VibrationData LoggingBump Test
PPE & Fire Extinguishers 2 Products
PPE · Firefighter Suit

Firefighter Suit & PPE — Personal Protection

Meta-Aramid multi-layer firefighter protective suits. Entry and proximity range. EN 469 compliant. Heat barrier to 1000°C — far superior to standard cotton or synthetic coveralls.

Meta-Aramid ShellEN 469Entry / Proximity1000°C Barrier
PPE · Extinguishers

Fire Extinguishers — Multi-Type Range

Complete range of BIS-marked refillable fire extinguishers. Available in ABC powder, CO₂, foam and water types for offices, hospitals, vehicles and industrial premises.

1–9 KgRefillableBIS MarkedABC / CO₂ / Foam

About Kairox Safety Engineers

Trusted Engineering.
Assured Safety.

A specialist fire safety and rescue equipment company delivering certified, tested products from leading global manufacturers — with the technical expertise to match the right solution to every application.

7+
Years of domain expertise in fire safety equipment
18+
Product models across 6 categories
6
Product categories covering every fire safety need
24h
Maximum quote turnaround time

Kairox Safety Engineers is a specialist fire safety and rescue equipment company based in Kochi, Kerala, India. Founded with a single purpose: to supply equipment that genuinely protects people — certified, tested, and fully backed by the manufacturer.

With over 7 years of hands-on domain expertise across the full fire safety product spectrum, we bring technical depth that goes well beyond product listings. We understand every product we supply — its application, its limitations, its standards compliance, and its real-world performance.

We work directly with OEM manufacturers to ensure genuine equipment, competitive pricing, and factory warranty support. Every product comes with complete documentation — manufacturer authorization, test certificates, and compliance reports.

From watermist CAFS backpacks for narrow-lane urban response to 250-litre stored-pressure systems for large industrial facilities; from ARAI-approved motorcycle fire vehicles to EN 137 certified SCBA — our portfolio covers every application in the fire safety and rescue domain.

We are registered on the Government e-Marketplace (GeM), fully GST compliant, and equipped to support procurement across all sectors — industrial, commercial, hospitality, healthcare, defence, and beyond.

Technical Integrity

We supply only certified, OEM-authorized equipment. We will not compromise on product quality, compliance, or documentation — ever.

Application Expertise

7+ years of field knowledge means we recommend the right product for the right application — not just what's in stock.

Complete Documentation

Every supply comes with manufacturer authorization, test certificates, and compliance documentation. No gaps in your procurement file.

Responsive Partnership

Direct access to the founder. Fast quotations, technical clarifications, and commercial decisions without layers of bureaucracy.

Lifecycle Commitment

We support beyond supply — AMC contracts, cylinder testing, equipment re-certification, and spares support for the full service life.

"Fire safety is not a commodity. It is a commitment. Every product we supply is something we would trust with our own safety."
KS

Founder, Kairox Safety Engineers

Kochi, Kerala, India
